title: Hardening: expanded red-team, WCAG 2.2 AA, PWA, deletion/retention verification + pilot runbook
context: Before a real official uses the tool, it must be hardened: expanded misuse red-team still passing 100%; core flows meeting WCAG 2.2 AA; PWA working offline-friendly on mobile (the target audience); deletion/retention verified end-to-end; a pilot onboarding runbook ready. This task is the last engineering gate before M5 pilot adoption.
objective: Harden the tool for a real pilot user: expand the red-team suite (still 100% refused), verify WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility on core flows, confirm PWA offline-friendly behavior, verify deletion/retention end-to-end, and write the pilot onboarding runbook.
acceptanceCriteria: Expanded misuse red-team suite still reports 100% refused/redirected; injection attempts covered; suite size >= previous version
Core flows (duties lookup, ethics flag, casework entry, briefing generation, daily briefing) meet WCAG 2.2 AA as verified by automated tool and manual spot-check
PWA functions offline-friendly on mobile (service worker, offline fallback, installable)
Deletion/retention verified end-to-end: deletion SLA honored, auto-purge window honored, recordsLawHold exemption correct
Pilot onboarding runbook written (deploy steps, first-use flow, known limitations, escalation contacts)
Guardrail reviewer and Maintainer sign off
output: A merged PR with an expanded red-team suite (100% refused), WCAG 2.2 AA core flows, PWA offline support, verified deletion/retention, and a pilot onboarding runbook.
